name: kb-lifecycle
description: Distribute KB Factory memory lifecycle and wiki maintenance across Codex workspaces.

interface.longDescription: Install a reusable skill that keeps Codex sessions grounded in the workspace .kb runtime, derived wiki, and lifecycle rules.
defaultPrompt: Use KB Lifecycle to ingest a new source into my project KB.
Use KB Lifecycle to answer from the KB and file a durable analysis.
Use KB Lifecycle to run a maintenance pass on NOW, HOT, and the wiki.
